capabilities.name: Page hierarchy/tree
capabilities.verify: wiki_pages.parent_slug (FK, ON DELETE SET NULL) + manage_wiki_hierarchy skill (set_parent/tree/children, cycle guard) (20260708070000). LIVE VERIFIED on rzhj 2026-07-07 via gateway: parent set, children listed, cycle rejected with explicit error.

capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.verify: search_wiki skill (ILIKE over title + content_md); search box in admin WikiPage.tsx

capabilities.name: Internal linking
capabilities.verify: [[WikiWord]]/CamelCase auto-linking documented in manage_wiki_page content_md param; WikiMarkdown.tsx renders links and auto-creates missing pages

capabilities.name: Version history
capabilities.verify: wiki_page_revisions + BEFORE UPDATE/DELETE capture trigger + wiki_page_history skill (list/get/restore, restore recreates deleted pages) (20260708070000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: edit captured revision 1, restore returned the page to v1 content.

capabilities.name: Access permissions
capabilities.verify: wiki_pages.visibility(internal|admin) + editable_by(authenticated|admin), enforced in RLS read/update policies + manage_wiki_permissions skill (20260708070000). LIVE VERIFIED 2026-07-07: set/get admin-only visibility via the gateway.
capabilities.notes: Page-level (not per-user ACL): visibility internal/admin + edit lock authenticated/admin, enforced at the database layer.
